description: Import field data from the GPX file at /home/ga/GIS_Data/raw_gps/survey_data.gpx and extract the waypoints. Export the waypoints layer to a projected GeoPackage at /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/field_observations.gpkg for web mapping. Use the EPSG:3857 (WGS 84 / Pseudo-Mercator) coordinate reference system and name the layer 'observations'.
